title: ageratina leiocarpa
intro: Ageratina leiocarpa, also known as Yerba de la Mora or White Top, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina leiocarpa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Ageratina leiocarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
